title: A Sunday Solo Date in Bangalore
excerpt: A soft little note on taking yourself out, finding a beautiful café, ordering slowly, and letting the city feel like a scene from your own film.
content:
There is something deeply beautiful about learning to take yourself out. To choose a café, dress slowly, and romanticize your own company.

That Sunday afternoon felt less like loneliness and more like freedom.

Sometimes, self-love is simply allowing yourself softness without waiting for someone else to bring it.
